# DOMD Vendor Notes

- Upstream: https://github.com/do-md/domd
- Version: v0.1.3
- Purpose: bundled static Markdown editor window for HyperRead's built-in DOMD plugin.
- License note: DOMD application/helper code is MIT; the `@do-md/dist` core is PolyForm Noncommercial 1.0.0. Commercial distribution requires upstream authorization.
